description: First-pass CSS grid: repeat()/fr/auto/fixed tracks, row-major auto-placement, grid-column span, row/column gaps.
visual_assertions: Six cells fill a 3-column grid as two rows of equal-width tracks with gaps.
The 120pt/auto/1fr row: fixed yellow column, teal column shrink-wrapped to its text, pink column taking the remainder.
The dashboard places a span-2 chart plus two KPIs on row one, and two KPIs plus a span-2 panel on row two.
Row gap (8pt) and column gap (12pt) are visibly different.
